name: The Woods
description: A dense forest with towering trees.
enhacedDescription:
The woods are dense and silent, with only the occasional rustle of leaves
in the wind. The air smells damp, and you hear the distant call of an owl.
You see an old sword and shield laying around.

name: The Clearing
description: A small clearing with sunlight streaming through.
enhacedDescription:
The clearing is a small, open space surrounded by tall, shadowy trees.
The soft rustling of leaves can be heard in the gentle breeze, and the air
smells fresh, with hints of wildflowers and earth. The sun's
setting light filters through the canopy above, casting
dappled patterns on the ground. In the center, a small stream
trickles, its sound soothing against the quiet of the night. The peaceful
atmosphere is interrupted only by the occasional call of a distant bird.
There's a map nailed to a dead trunk tree in front of you.

items.name: Map
items.description: A map of the surrounding area.

name: a cave
description: A crooked entrance opens between some bushes deep in the woods ahead.
enhacedDescription:
The cave is damp and smells of earth and moss.
The air is cool, and the ground is uneven.
You can hear the distant echoes of water dripping from the ceiling.
In the distance, over a rock, you see what appears to be a fresh torch pole.

items.name: Torch
items.description: A stick clothed in its tip ready to be fired.

name: a path
description: A long dirt path surrounded by trees where you cannot see the sky above.
enhacedDescription:
The path stretches endlessly through the dense woods, the dirt beneath your feet soft and uneven.
Tall trees line both sides, their thick branches intertwining overhead, blocking out most of the sky.
The air is heavy with the scent of damp earth and decaying leaves, and the only sounds you hear are
 the rustling of branches in the wind. As you walk, the path seems to wind deeper into the forest,
 the light growing dimmer. Occasionally, you catch glimpses of small animals darting between the trees.

name: a road
description:
A wide road made out of boulders. It's easy
 to appreaciate it could be some kind of main road leading somewhere.
enhacedDescription:
The road stretches wide, paved with large boulders smoothed 
from countless footsteps and the passage of time and carriages. There's 
a solemn feel here, as if many have traveled this path 
long ago, making their way to unknown places beyond. 
The rough stones underfoot give way to traces of weeds 
and moss, hinting at nature's quiet reclamation.

In the fading light, shadows gather along the sides 
of the road, and a sense of anticipation lingers 
in the cool air. You can see the faint silhouette 
of a building to the east, likely an inn, while to the 
west the path disappears into the dense, mysterious 
woods. A glimpse further south, seems another path forks.

exits.south: the path forking to the south

name: the path forking to the south
description:
You make your way down the path that forks south, carefully stepping over the polished mossy boulders
 of the road. A cold breeze tingles your neck as you approach the turn.
enhacedDescription:
A caravan suddenly appears neatly tilted onto the road, 'tis an old wooden cart draped in colorful fabrics, with a faint
 smell of spices and leather. A weary merchant does not even greet you, his eyes scanning the horizon 
dead and distant. He seemd to come from afar. Not only his face, partly coverd by a folded cloth,
 but his eyes where a different gaze, just as his thick accent as he spoke your language to salute you,
 from somewhere you couldn't even glimpse.
